$note: Per-Way design laws + pool-wide cost bands, as data. ONE source of truth, two readers: bake-codex.py bakes it into the codex Workbench (WAY_LAWS), and card-lint (src/engine/card-lint.ts) enforces the machine-checkable rules at build time. Content derives from locked canon + logged decisions (GDD A1-A6, D-025, the Way briefs) — change it via a decision, not a drive-by edit. A Way appears here when its design brief is written; the Workbench lights it up on the next bake.

banned.why: banned pool-wide — a room-sized fill one-shots the crown (D-025 R3 ruling)

eveners.name: The Eveners
eveners.winLever: Retired pieces fatten the room, the chain multiplies it, and the capstone clears its mark on the fattened room — the Way fills by chain.
eveners.coreLoop: retire → room/table · whittle → handsels · steady → chain · capstone rest(room)

bannedPrimitives.why: Fairwright-only — the Eveners never spike the overflow
Gleaner-only — the board is not this Way's business

amountBans.why: room is fuelled by retires, never the purse — no read(handsels) feeding gather or room

laws: Room is fuelled by retires, never the purse — no read(handsels) feeding gather or room; handsels are never spent inside a turn.
Fills read the chain. Bare grain-count fills are Untold-only (D-025), and fill(room) is banned pool-wide.
Twice-benched grade keys only to chosen last-lightings, never to failure.
forks: the fattened room can be whittled into handsels (deck growth) or poured into the capstone (the win). Same fuel, two spouts — the Way's central choice.
room helps this morning; the table pays tomorrow's dawn, only if you camp. Ties the Way to the camp decision — and at-dusk is an unused trigger begging for it.
every retire thins the deck permanently. Composting chaff is free; composting a good card for tempo is a real cost.

slots.name: Capstone payoff
slots.note: canon C3 shape at capstone cost — the loop's missing end

slots.name: Chain-fillers
slots.note: repeatable, read chain; chainwise-gift is the proven model

slots.name: Builders (retire→room)
slots.note: exist today; differentiate by what they compost

slots.name: Consistency supports
slots.note: the open space: on-stall brace, at-dusk camp/table, on-wake one-timers

slots.name: Cyclers (draw)
slots.note: fewer than today; the thin-deck refill
